exchanges.description: An array of exchange descriptors. Exchange descriptor is an object {value, name, desc}

futures_regex.description: Set it if you want to group futures in the symbol search. This REGEX should divide an instrument name into 2 parts (a root and an expiration)

supports_time.description: Set this one to `true` if your datafeed provides server time (unix time). It is used to adjust Countdown on the Price scale

supports_marks.description: Boolean showing whether your datafeed supports marks on bars or not

supports_search.description: Set it to `true` if your data feed supports symbol search and individual symbol resolve logic

supports_group_request.description: Set it to `true` if your data feed provides full information on symbol group only and is not able to perform symbol search or individual symbol resolve

supports_timescale_marks.description: Boolean showing whether your datafeed supports timescale marks or not

parameters.description: The maximum number of symbols in a response

112.summary: Return symbol info for TradingView chart

minmov.description: the amount of price precision steps for 1 tick

sector.description: Sector for stocks to be displayed in the Symbol Info

expired.description: Boolean value showing whether this symbol is an expired futures contract or not

exchange.description: short name of the exchange where this symbol is traded

industry.description: Industry for stocks to be displayed in the Symbol Info

has_daily.description: The boolean value showing whether data feed has its own daily resolution bars or not

pricescale.description: defines the number of decimal places

data_status.description: The status code of a series with this symbol. The status is shown in the upper right corner of a chart

has_seconds.description: Boolean value showing whether the symbol includes seconds in the historical data

has_intraday.description: Boolean value showing whether the symbol includes intraday (minutes) historical data

currency_code.description: Currency to be displayed in the Symbol Info

has_no_volume.description: Boolean showing whether the symbol includes volume data or not

has_empty_bars.description: The boolean value showing whether the library should generate empty bars in the session when there is no data from the data feed for this particular time

expiration_date.description: Unix timestamp of the expiration date. One must set this value when expired = true

listed_exchange.description: short name of the exchange where this symbol is listed

volume_precision.description: Integer showing typical volume value decimal places for a particular symbol. 0 means volume is always an integer. 1 means that there might be 1 numeric character after the comma

seconds_multipliers.description: It is an array containing resolutions that include seconds (excluding postfix) that the data feed provides

intraday_multipliers.description: Array of resolutions (in minutes) supported directly by the data feed

force_session_rebuild.description: the boolean value showing whether the library should filter bars using the current trading session

has_weekly_and_monthly.description: The boolean value showing whether data feed has its own weekly and monthly resolution bars or not
